sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38759" key="e)peteiofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπετειο-φόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n38759.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fruiting every year,</tr_> ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
